title: Invincible: Reforged
body:
This mod is an ADDON


This addon was created to add more content variety to the Forge 1.20.1 version, expanding ideas, mechanics, and possibilities that were never developed in the original mod.

Since the original creator eventually abandoned the project, many features were left unfinished or were never added. Because of that, this addon aims to continue that path by bringing new content, improvements, and extra features to make the experience more complete, fun, and varied.

The goal is not to replace the original mod, but to complement it, keeping its base while adding new possibilities for players, servers, and content creators who still want to enjoy the mod’s potential on Forge 1.20.1.

( Using Mixins )

U need to download: the original Mod, click on the image

Thanks for reading, any question comments!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Commands/Gamerules

- `/skill available`
  Shows all available addon skills.

- `/skill list`
  Shows your unlocked skills, ability lock status, and skill slots.

- `/skill list <player>`
  Shows another player's unlocked skills and slots.

- `/skill add <ability>`
  Unlocks a specific skill for yourself.

- `/skill add all`
  Unlocks all registered skills for yourself.

- `/skill add to <player> <ability>`
  Unlocks a specific skill for another player.

- `/skill remove <ability>`
  Locks/removes a specific skill from yourself.

- `/skill remove all`
  Locks/removes all addon skills from yourself.

- `/skill remove from <player> <ability>`
  Locks/removes a specific skill from another player.

- `/skill slots add <amount>`
  Adds ability slots to yourself.

- `/skill slots add <amount> <player>`
  Adds ability slots to another player.

- `/skill slots remove <amount>`
  Removes ability slots from yourself.

- `/skill slots remove <amount> <player>`
  Removes ability slots from another player.

- `/gamerule invincibleReforgedXpGain true/false`
  Enables or disables the addon XP gain changes.

- `/gamerule invincibleReforgedAgeSystem true/false`
  Enables or disables the addon age system changes.

- `/gamerule invincibleReforgedMissionRewards true/false`
  Enables or disables mission rewards.

- `/gamerule invincibleReforgedSkillCommand true/false`
  Enables or disables the `/skill` command.

- `/gamerule invincibleReforgedAbilityLocks true/false`
  Enables or disables the skill unlock system.
  When enabled, players can only use skills they have unlocked.
  When disabled, skills are usable normally.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Content

## New Skills

### Portal
- Blink Portal
- Anchor Gate
- Reality Slip
- Improved Dimensional Portal system
- Custom portal visuals/model

### Atomic
- Pink Shield
- Energy Barrage
- Body Mend
- Perfect Defense
- Improved Blast with bigger damage, wider AOE, and circular impact effect
- Custom pink shield model/renderer

### Spider
- Web Cocoon
- Spider Sense
- Improved Spider skill handling for 5 slots
- Web Shooter / Web Slam / Web Pull support through the addon system

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

New System & Features

## New Systems / Features

- Skill Loadout GUI
  - Opened with `K`
  - Shows current race
  - Shows the Invincible ability bar
  - Shows all available skills
  - Allows players to equip/change skills between slots

- Creative mode cooldown bypass
  - If the player is in Creative/GM1, addon skills do not use cooldowns.

- Removed/cleaned WIP labels from some race/tooltips.

- Mission/reward support for addon progression.

</details>


Download this for loading my mod:> https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/invincibleconquest
